events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

**Decision: needs_more_info** (risk: medium)

The crew's proposed sizing shortcut can't be validated against NEC 310/Table 310.16 without two missing pieces: the product/UL listing page (needed to confirm conductor insulation and equipment terminal temperature ratings) and the project engineering note (which would state whether the shortcut is actually authorized here). Applying a shortcut like an elevated ampacity column without confirming terminations are rated for it risks a 110.14(C) violation and overheated terminations — a real fire hazard — so it can't be waved through, but it also isn't yet a confirmed defect since the missing docs might justify it. Non-blocked field work (routing, support, fill, grounding) can proceed while the documentation gap is closed.
